title: Yijing Hexagram 35: Jin (Progress)
description: Hexagram 35 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 35 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Progress. The powerful prince is honored with horses in large numbers. In a single day he is granted audience three times.
